name: Angel Hair Soup with Chicken & Pine Nuts
recipeIngredient: 2 Chicken breast halves, skinned and boned, about 1/2 lb total
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into thin strips, approximately 1/4 inch by 1-inch pieces. Cut the pasta into 1-inch pieces. Mince the parsley and set aside.
2. Bring the chicken broth to a boil in a covered medium saucepan over high heat. Add the chicken and reduce the heat to medium-high. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the chicken is almost cooked through, about 1 minute. Add the angel hair pasta and cook until tender but still firm, an additional 2 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, place the pine nuts in a small, dry frying pan over medium heat. Cook, stirring occasionally, until golden brown, approximately 3 minutes.
4. To serve, spoon the soup into bowls and garnish with the pine nuts and minced parsley.
